chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 929 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 27.03.2025 Mr. Nusrat Hussain J. Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for Respondents/SEPCO Mr. Ishfaque Ahmed Abro, Assistant Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< Statement has been filed by learned counsel for the Respondents/SEPCO along with copy of Bill amounting to Rs.9911/-, which has been delivered to the Counsel for the petitioner. He further submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed and his electricity connection has been permanently disconnected. On such statement of the Counsel for the respondents/SEPCO, learned Counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
